Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 2.8 cm x 1.6 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 73% slough, 27% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0

Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
